meaning: n.[建]纵的沟纹,竖沟n.[考古]浮雕,象形文字n.[计]字形,字的轮廓
examples: If you double-click the new class glyph, you see a screen like this.
When a particular character is rendered, the shape representing this character is called a glyph.
He adopted as his name glyph (personal insignia) a knotted diadem, the symbol of authority itself.
Glyph has also parked itself in Detroit for a number of business reasons.
Though, at this time, photo uploads and friend tagging options are not available, making the Glyph check-in process a bit bland.
